summary: Tested Mira OS Pet Assistant /mira-demo page with 18 test scenario chips. Fixed 422 validation error caused by non-array pet context fields. All key features verified working including E024-E034 enhancements.

minor.issue: Returns 422 when pet_context.allergies or notes is string instead of array - fixed in frontend by ensuring array format

test_scenarios_panel.all_18_chips_visible: PASS - All 18 test scenario chips displayed correctly

chip_click_tests.treats_chip: PASS - 'Show me some treats' query triggers treat-related response with clarifying question
chip_click_tests.calm_chip_e032: PASS - 'Something to calm during Diwali fireworks' triggers anxiety/calming response with semantic search
chip_click_tests.skin_chip_e032: PASS - 'Has dry itchy skin, keeps scratching' triggers skin care response with semantic search
chip_click_tests.not_eating_chip_e025: PASS - 'Not eating and seems tired today' triggers mood detection (high_concern) and health concern response
chip_click_tests.memory_chip_e033: PASS - 'Remember when we talked about skin issues?' triggers conversation memory recall

ui_elements.header_mira_logo: PASS - Mira header with logo visible
ui_elements.pet_selector_dropdown: PASS - Shows 7 pets with breeds, switch functionality works
ui_elements.ticker_animation: PASS - Dynamic ticker with weather, personalization stats, pet-friendly places
ui_elements.ready_for_pet_tray: PASS - Opens tray with bundles, health vault, weather suggestions, Concierge® options
ui_elements.dock_buttons: PASS - All 5 dock buttons present (Concierge®, Orders, Plan, Help, Soul)

e024_e034_features.E025_mood_detection: PASS - Console shows '[MOOD] Detected pet mood concern: high_concern'
e024_e034_features.E032_semantic_search: PASS - Console shows '[SEMANTIC] Intent detected' with product results
e024_e034_features.E033_conversation_memory: PASS - Console shows '[MEMORY] Found relevant past conversation: skin'

bugs_fixed.issue: 422 Unprocessable Entity error from /api/mira/route_intent when pet.traits or pet.sensitivities is a string instead of array
bugs_fixed.root_cause: doggy_soul_answers.describe_3_words, health_conditions, favorite_treats might be stored as comma-separated strings in database but Pydantic model expects arrays
bugs_fixed.fix_description: Added array validation to ensure pet_context fields are always arrays - converts strings to arrays by splitting on commas

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding array validation in backend Pydantic model for pet_context fields to be more forgiving of string inputs
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/MiraDemoPage.jsx - Lines 1814-1820: Added array validation for pet_context fields
/app/frontend/src/pages/MiraDemoPage.jsx - Lines 810-830: Added ensureArray helper for pet data transformation
/app/frontend/src/pages/MiraDemoPage.jsx - Lines 1130-1155: Added ensureArray helper for fetchPet

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 18 test scenarios clickable and triggering appropriate responses

seed_data_creation: Test tickets created with TCK-2026-000001 through TCK-2026-000004
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira Demo page (/mira-demo) verified fully functional. All 18 test scenario chips work correctly after fixing array validation bug. Key E024-E034 features working: E025 mood detection, E032 semantic search, E033 conversation memory. Pet selector switches between 7 pets. Ticker animation displays personalized content.
